What it changes

Typical outputs

Intake flow, dashboard layout, process notes, and implementation scope.

Engineering Approach

AI Workflow Automation

Map approvals, handoffs, reminders, and reporting into one calm operating flow that saves time without hiding decisions.

Detail

Custom Dashboards

Turn scattered numbers into a decision console with clean KPI hierarchy, source trust, and fast drill-down paths.

Detail

Internal Tools

Replace brittle spreadsheets with compact internal tools for intake, tracking, QA, and team visibility.

Detail

CRM & Data Cleanup

Repair duplicate records, stale stages, and broken field logic so reporting and automation stop drifting.

Detail

WordPress Integrations

Connect websites, forms, and content workflows to the systems your team actually uses every day.

Detail

Reporting Systems

Automate recurring reports and executive summaries so leaders see the same story every week.

Detail

Engineering Approach

Small releases, explicit owners, and visible data contracts keep the work usable after launch.

How We Scope Work

We start with process maps, edge cases, and the data that breaks decisions, not vague feature lists.

Maintenance is documented, measured, and designed for the operations team that inherits the system.

Work

The strongest visual page in the system, built like a live command console.

Use the filters below to inspect how automation, dashboard, and data-cleanup projects shape the same operating layer from different angles.

Start a project Browse services

Featured case study

A system that cut weekly routing lag and made the queue visible.

This case study shows the dashboard, routing logic, and cleanup layer as one connected flow.

Project outcome

Routing lag dropped by 63%, manual report prep fell sharply, and managers could see exceptions in one review screen.

System notes

Data cleanup happened before automation, and each step had a clear fallback path for the operations team.

Built components

Intake map, queue monitor, exception panel, and recurring summary email.

Project archive

Twelve project cards across automation, dashboards, internal tools, reporting, and cleanup.

Filtering keeps the collection readable while still showing the breadth of the operating systems we build.

automation

Retail operations grid

A dispatcher workflow that reduced follow-up time by 63% across support, billing, and onboarding.

data

Service CRM repair

A cleanup pass that merged duplicate customers, aligned stages, and stabilized weekly reports.

dashboard

Warehouse reporting console

A warehouse dashboard with live counts, issue flags, and concise shift summaries.

integration

Field service intake

A form-to-ticket bridge that routed jobs, notes, and images into the team queue.

automation

Operations command map

A routing layer that turned exceptions into review items rather than hidden dead ends.

dashboard

Founder KPI suite

An executive view that tracks revenue, response time, backlog, and churn in one place.

workflow

Client onboarding system

A sequenced intake path with reminders, approvals, and missing-field checks.

integration

Reconciliation assistant

A system that flags unmatched records and creates a review list for finance.

dashboard

Ops health monitor

A live operations panel that makes stalled tasks, queue pressure, and errors visible.

data

Data pipe cleaner

A pipeline that mapped dirty fields, normalized naming, and reduced manual audit work.

reporting

Automated reporting desk

A recurring reporting system with annotated summaries and on-time delivery.

automation

Task orchestration hub

A planning desk for cross-team work that keeps every step visible to managers.

System visuals

Clean dashboards, queue maps, and support monitors.

These panels are designed to mirror the finished WordPress theme, not just a gallery of isolated assets.

AstraGrid Systems

Move work out of spreadsheets and into a cleaner operating system.

We build premium automation, analytics, and internal tools for teams that need sharper decisions and steadier weekly operations.
